meta.title: Reflections on Bangladesh: A Discussion with Economist and Freedom Fighter Rehman Sobhan
meta.description: Dr. Rehman Sobhan and Ambassador Husain Haqqani discuss Untranquil Recollections: The Years of Fulfilment and Bangladesh’s past, present, and future. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
